bio_summary: 1872-1961. Methodist missionary, mountaineer, and photographer. Active in the Alpine Club of Canada from 1906. Climbed Mt. Stephen and contributed the chapter 'Mt. Stephen' to CAJ Vol.1 No.1 (1907). Credited with multiple photographs in that journal. Later famous for disputed 1909 first ascent of Mt. Robson with Donald 'Curly' Phillips.

fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.fonds_title: Alpine Club of Canada fonds — Correspondence and papers
fonds.scope: Correspondence and papers re ACC finances, government relations, history, international relations, and properties; includes correspondence with G. Kinney, Mount Robson records, etc.
fonds.findings: Alpine Club of Canada records confirm Kinney's involvement in ACC activities and Mount Robson expeditions. Specific 1906 Yoho materials not yet digitized or accessible online.
fonds.notes: Contact Whyte Museum directly for access to full ACC correspondence files.

fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.fonds_title: George Kinney photographs and price lists
fonds.findings: Approximately 64 photographs cataloged. Primarily from Paradise Valley Alpine Club camp (1907), not 1906 Yoho. No digitized access evident.
fonds.notes: These photos are in Whyte's physical collection but not online. Possible archival research request required.

fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.fonds_title: J. Monroe Thorington fonds — Mountaineering correspondence and papers
fonds.findings: Contains reference to George Kinney in letter dated September 7, 1934, discussing Mount Robson expeditions and early 1900s mountaineering. No specific 1906 Yoho camp material identified.
fonds.notes: May contain correspondence mentioning Kinney's early climbing work; worth requesting access.

fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.fonds_id: V653 (Vaux family) / M200 (Alpine Club) / V14 (Frank Yeigh) / V263 (Byron Harmon)
fonds.fonds_title: Collective Yoho Pass 1906 ACC camp photographs and records
fonds.scope: Photographs and camp records from Yoho Pass 1906 Alpine Club of Canada camp
fonds.findings: Multiple collections document the 1906 Yoho Pass camp, including work by J.P. Forde (225 prints), Frank Yeigh (7 prints), Vaux family (228+ prints), and Byron Harmon albums. Kinney's specific photographic contributions are not separately identified in these collections, though he may appear in group photos or be credited in original CAJ publication.
fonds.notes: These are physical collections; digitization status unclear. Requires direct museum contact for access to original prints or finding aids.

fonds.fonds_id: United Church of Canada collection (pending identification)
fonds.fonds_title: Methodist missionary records / United Church archives
fonds.scope: Methodist and United Church of Canada missionary records
fonds.findings: LAC website currently inaccessible via standard search tools. Kinney's Methodist affiliation suggests papers may exist in Church archives.
fonds.notes: PENDING: Direct contact with Library and Archives Canada or United Church Archives (Toronto) required.

fonds.scope: Methodist/United Church missionary correspondence, diaries, reports
fonds.findings: No digital search possible; archive location in Toronto. Likely to have Kinney's personnel file and mission reports if preserved.
fonds.notes: PENDING: Contact United Church Archives directly at archives@united-church.ca or 416-231-5931

fonds.fonds_title: BC mountaineering and personal papers collections
fonds.scope: British Columbia mountaineering and explorer papers
fonds.findings: Royal BC Museum search interface inaccessible (certificate issues). May hold Kinney materials due to his BC work and Mount Robson prominence.
fonds.notes: PENDING: Direct contact required at Royal BC Museum, Victoria. Phone: 250-356-7226

fonds.institution: University of Calgary Archives & Special Collections (Glenbow Western Research Centre)
fonds.scope: Canadian mountaineering records, particularly Alberta/BC region
fonds.findings: Glenbow holds mountaineering papers; Kinney materials not identified in preliminary search.
fonds.notes: PENDING: Contact Archives and Special Collections: asc@ucalgary.libanswers.com or 403-220-3958 (Mon-Fri 10am-4:30pm, by appointment)

fonds.scope: ACC member records, camp registers, journals, expedition records
fonds.findings: ACC likely holds camp registers from 1906 Yoho that may name Kinney and list his activities/photos.
fonds.notes: PENDING: Contact Alpine Club of Canada directly at national office. May have original camp records, CAJ back issues with photo credits.

search_log.result: 56 records found; Alpine Club of Canada fonds (M200) contains key materials
4 records at Whyte; Alpine Club of Canada (M200/AC 00M/119-121), Luxton family, J. Monroe Thorington fonds
30 records; primarily Mount Robson area (Byron Harmon, Vaux family); 64 Kinney photos from 1905-1910 in M200/V14
Multiple collections (Vaux, Yeigh, Forde, Harmon); Kinney not separately identified as photographer in these results
1 record; J. Monroe Thorington fonds with 1934 letter referencing Kinney's mountaineering
Internet Archive search inconclusive; CAJ Vol. 1 (1907) not yet located with direct downloadable link
